title: 20 officially not rubbish say Razzies and Rotten Tomatoes
display_title: 20 officially not rubbish say Razzies and Rotten Tomatoes
wikitext:
[]: 2.0 officially 'not rubbish' say Razzies and Rotten Tomatoes Post by Jayfive » Thu Jan 27, 2011 8:53 pm http://www.rottentomatoes.com/m/evangerion-shin-gekijoban-ha/ 2.0 actually gets reviewed. Yay. Critics say mostly nice things. Also Yay. http://www.razzies.com/forum/the-2011-list-jan-128_topic4752_post38150.html?KW=evangelion#38150 Officially better than The Dilemma, The Rite, Season of The Witch. Umm....yay?

[]: Post by Clover » Thu Jan 27, 2011 9:34 pm 4 whole reviews! Maybe we'll get 6 for 3.0 Oh wait. 3.0 is never coming out. In other news, essentialforum inputs his magnificent opinion. What grace and style. 10/10! Just look at that emoticon usage implying that he is overjoyed at such a metacritic score! What a bitter man!

[]: Post by esselfortium » Thu Jan 27, 2011 9:37 pm http://www.metacritic.com/movie/evangelion-20-you-can-not-advance

[]: Post by GasmaskAvenger » Thu Jan 27, 2011 9:46 pm this is what i've been saying the whole time in the whole grand scheme of awful movies, 2.0 simply cannot cut being a piece of shit it just can't. at all and never will in all honesty...at worst, Rebuild 2.0 is just disappointment to certain folk, hence creating the illusion that its a piece of shit

[]: Post by Legendary » Thu Jan 27, 2011 10:42 pm So, one post from someone who links to one review agglomeration to prove 2.0 is good. One post of stupid, unnecessary sarcasm and personal attacks on a member. One post that is nothing but a link to a review agglomeration to prove 2.0 is bad and an emoticon. One post with a lot of sarcasm to make up for the complete lack of grammar. Why is this still unlocked? EDIT: Also, the reviews from Rotten Tomatoes were hilarious. I'm not sure whether I liked the one that apparently saw a 2.0 with a STEELE organization or the one that was clearly written by a die hard anime fan better.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jan 27, 2011 11:27 pm Legendary wrote: Why is this still unlocked?
